subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the Beauty of Bahá! Didst thou but know to what degree the glance of God's loving-kindness is directed toward thee, verily thou wouldst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون جمال بها اگر بدانی که نظر عنایت حق در حق تو بچه درجه است البته از
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation
